name: substrait
description: Build and deploy apps on the Substrait platform from Claude Code. Bundles the substrait-app skill (scaffold apps to the upload/deploy contract) plus /substrait:link and /substrait:deploy to connect a local project to a Substrait app and ship it without leaving the terminal, /substrait:env to manage the app's environment variables and secrets, and /substrait:library to browse the platform's API Library and design apps against existing APIs.
